title: The War at Marineford Begins: Key Exchange
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Spandam, Franky, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Spandam, Franky, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #5, focusing on the immediate stakes of the war at marineford begins: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: What are you doing here, GARP?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: You have a complaint about my strategy?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: No... those are pirates we're up against...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I have no pity for them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I have no pity for these Knaves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't you dare hit Luffy, old Geezer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: what do you expect me to do....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: It's this idiot's wink that did it!
